name: grav_newtonian_recovery
description: accumulated correction vanishes; Newtonian acceleration recovered

name: grav_stress_vanishes
relation: delta T_ij -> 0 as alpha -> 0  =>  T_ij^eff -> T_ij^N
description: effective stress reduces to Newtonian stress in far field

name: grav_poisson_dim_balance
description: dimensional balance of the emergent Poisson closure
